message:
test(oracle): add conformance tests for CTEs, triggers, transactions, foreign keys

4 new conformance oracle tests: recursive/non-recursive CTEs (Fibonacci,
org chart), AFTER INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE triggers with NEW/OLD, ROLLBACK +
SAVEPOINT semantics, and FK constraint enforcement. All pass with 0 mismatches.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
